decision.next_action: Owner records decision, sizing, and a direct response to the strongest dissent.

components.label: Homebuilding owner earnings
components.growth_driver: Normalize margins, cancellations, housing starts, and working capital; capitalize cash earnings after maintenance needs, not peak GAAP earnings.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

components.evidence: 2025 Form 10-K homebuilding earnings and cash-flow disclosures.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

components.label: Mortgage banking
components.growth_driver: Separate mortgage economics from homebuilding and normalize origination volumes, gain-on-sale margins, and repurchase exposure.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

components.label: Net surplus cash
components.growth_driver: Credit only cash demonstrably surplus to land deposits, working capital, mortgage funding, and debt.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

components.evidence: 2025 Form 10-K cash less senior notes; operating and mortgage liquidity buffers require further review.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

components.label: Controlled-lot and future-community optionality
components.growth_driver: Value the asymmetric lot-control structure separately from current earnings, net of deposits, abandonment, and time-to-open.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

components.evidence: NVR primarily controls lots through forfeitable deposits rather than owning land; community-level inventory remains to be reconciled.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

components.label: Housing-cycle and execution reserve
components.growth_driver: Deduct for lower volumes/margins, cancellation risk, community delays, and buybacks executed above intrinsic value.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

components.evidence: 2025 backlog was 8,448 units and cancellation rate 17%; regional and affordability stresses require normalization.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

options.label: Controlled-lot and future-community optionality
options.growth_driver: Value the asymmetric lot-control structure separately from current earnings, net of deposits, abandonment, and time-to-open.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.strongest_dissent: The apparent capital-light compounder may simply be a favorable-cycle homebuilder whose option deposits, working capital and buybacks absorb more cash in a downturn than the model allows.
unresolved_items: No community-level cycle history reproduces the owner-earnings range.
committee.next_action: Owner records decision, sizing, and a direct response to the strongest dissent.

gaps.question: Reconcile controlled lots, deposits, ownership, opening cadence, abandonment rates, and remaining development obligations.
gaps.evidence_required: Primary filings or contracts plus an independently reproducible calculation and relevant cross-check.
gaps.acceptance_test: The evidence reproduces the low/base/high bridge, resolves overlap, and identifies a falsifier and monitoring source.
gaps.progress_note: partially_met: controlled-lot counts and deposits disclosed; lot-level economics incomplete.

gaps.question: Normalize community-level volume, margin, cancellations, working capital, and maintenance needs across a housing cycle.
gaps.evidence_required: Primary filings or contracts plus an independently reproducible calculation and relevant cross-check.
gaps.acceptance_test: The evidence reproduces the low/base/high bridge, resolves overlap, and identifies a falsifier and monitoring source.
gaps.progress_note: partially_met: 2025 NI/CFO and working-capital bridges disclosed; downturn community cohort incomplete.

gaps.question: Separate truly distributable cash from homebuilding, mortgage, and stress-liquidity requirements.
gaps.evidence_required: Primary filings or contracts plus an independently reproducible calculation and relevant cross-check.
gaps.acceptance_test: The evidence reproduces the low/base/high bridge, resolves overlap, and identifies a falsifier and monitoring source.
gaps.progress_note: partially_met: cash and notes disclosed; minimum liquidity stress budget incomplete.

gaps.question: No community-level cycle history reproduces the owner-earnings range.
gaps.evidence_required: Resolve the committee's missing fact with primary evidence and update the affected valuation proof row.
gaps.acceptance_test: The committee item is explicitly closed, sourced, and reflected in the valuation range or documented as immaterial.

method_fit.label: High-return compounder
applicability_tests: Owner earnings can be separated from stock compensation, working capital, and maintenance capital.
Incremental returns on retained capital are observable and durable.
The competitive advantage explains pricing, retention, share, or cost outcomes.
Terminal value is supported by a reinvestment runway rather than an unexplained multiple.
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: The current component schedule is the first decision-grade baseline; attribution begins with the next dated valuation snapshot.
